title: Lesson Report BO – Report Tab – Published lesson – Collect Attendance popup opens
description: AC 01.1 / AC 01.3 — Decision Table — Confirm the Lesson Detail -> Report tab exposes Collect Attendance and opens the existing popup for an attendance-eligible lesson.
preconditions:
- Logged in to BO as a user who can already collect attendance
- A published lesson exists with at least one student session and an auto-created lesson report
- The same lesson can already open Collect Attendance from the existing BO flow
steps_actions:
1. "Open the lesson on BO and switch to the Report tab"
2. "Observe the action area on the Report tab"
3. "Click Collect Attendance"
4. "Observe the popup content"
steps_result:
1. "Report tab is displayed for the selected lesson"
2. "Collect Attendance button is visible and enabled"
3. "The existing Collect Attendance popup opens"
4. "Student list and attendance fields match the current collect-attendance popup structure"

title: Lesson Report BO – Lesson Report Detail – Published lesson – Collect Attendance popup opens
description: AC 01.2 / AC 01.3 — Decision Table — Confirm Lesson Report Detail exposes Collect Attendance and opens the existing popup for an attendance-eligible lesson.
preconditions:
- Logged in to BO as a user who can already collect attendance
- A published lesson exists with at least one student session and an accessible Lesson Report Detail page
steps_actions:
1. "Open Lesson Report Detail for a student in a published lesson"
2. "Observe the action area on Lesson Report Detail"
3. "Click Collect Attendance"
4. "Observe the popup content"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Report Detail is displayed"
2. "Collect Attendance button is visible and enabled"
3. "The existing Collect Attendance popup opens"
4. "Popup shows the same attendance fields and editable controls as the current BO flow"

title: Lesson Report BO – Report Tab – Draft lesson – Collect Attendance button disabled
description: AC 01.4 — Negative Testing — Confirm the new Report tab entry point does not bypass the current Draft-state guard.
preconditions:
- Logged in to BO as a user who can already collect attendance
- A draft lesson exists with a lesson report visible on the Report tab
steps_actions:
1. "Open the draft lesson on BO and switch to the Report tab"
2. "Observe the Collect Attendance action"
3. "Attempt to click the disabled button"
steps_result:
1. "Report tab is displayed"
2. "Collect Attendance button is visible but disabled"
3. "No popup opens and lesson attendance remains unchanged"

title: Lesson Report BO – Lesson Report Detail – Completed lesson – Collect Attendance button disabled
description: AC 01.4 — Negative Testing — Confirm the new Lesson Report Detail entry point does not bypass the current Completed-state guard.
preconditions:
- Logged in to BO as a user who can already collect attendance
- A completed lesson exists with an accessible Lesson Report Detail page
steps_actions:
1. "Open Lesson Report Detail for a student in a completed lesson"
2. "Observe the Collect Attendance action"
3. "Attempt to click the disabled button"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Report Detail is displayed"
2. "Collect Attendance button is visible but disabled"
3. "No popup opens and saved attendance data is unchanged"

title: Lesson Report BO – Report Tab – Absent attendance saved – Student session and mobile updated
description: AC 01.5 — Regression Analysis — Confirm saving attendance from Lesson Detail -> Report tab uses the same persistence and sync flow as the current collect-attendance path.
preconditions:
- Logged in to BO as a user who can already collect attendance
- A published lesson exists with at least one student session and an auto-created lesson report
- Student A can log in to Mobile and view the lesson
steps_actions:
1. "Open the lesson on BO, switch to the Report tab, and click Collect Attendance"
2. "Set Attendance Status to Absent"
3. "Select Attendance Reason, Attendance Notice, and enter Attendance Note"
4. "Click Save"
5. "View the student row on BO lesson detail"
6. "Open Mobile and view the same lesson"
steps_result:
1. "Collect Attendance popup opens"
2. "Absent-dependent fields become available"
3. "Values are accepted in the popup"
4. "Success message is shown and the popup closes"
5. "Student session shows Absent, Traffic Issue, No Contact, and the saved note"
6. "Mobile shows the updated attendance status for the student"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Status: Published"
2. "Attendance Status: Absent"
3. "Reason: Traffic Issue; Notice: No Contact; Note: Student absent due to traffic"
4. ""
5. ""
6. ""

title: Lesson Report BO – Lesson Report Detail – Late attendance saved – Lesson allocation and report detail updated
description: AC 01.5 — Regression Analysis — Confirm saving attendance from Lesson Report Detail updates the same downstream records as the current collect-attendance path.
preconditions:
- Logged in to BO as a user who can already collect attendance
- A published lesson exists with at least one student session, lesson allocation history, and an accessible Lesson Report Detail page
steps_actions:
1. "Open Lesson Report Detail and click Collect Attendance"
2. "Set Attendance Status to Late"
3. "Select Attendance Reason and Attendance Notice, then enter Attendance Note"
4. "Click Save"
5. "Refresh Lesson Report Detail"
6. "Open the student's lesson allocation report history"
steps_result:
1. "Collect Attendance popup opens"
2. "Late-dependent fields become available"
3. "Values are accepted in the popup"
4. "Success message is shown and the popup closes"
5. "Lesson Report Detail shows the updated Late attendance information"
6. "Report history reflects the updated attendance values for the lesson"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson Status: Published"
2. "Attendance Status: Late"
3. "Reason: School Event; Notice: On The Day; Note: Arrived late after school event"
4. ""
5. ""
6. ""

title: Lesson Report BO – Lesson Report Detail – Existing attendance record – Saved values prefilled on reopen
description: AC 01.5 — Equivalence Partitioning — Confirm reopening Collect Attendance from the new surface preserves previously saved reason, notice, and note values.
preconditions:
- Logged in to BO as a user who can already collect attendance
- A published lesson exists with attendance already saved for the selected student
- Saved attendance includes status, reason, notice, and note
steps_actions:
1. "Open Lesson Report Detail for the student with existing attendance"
2. "Click Collect Attendance"
3. "Observe the prefilled attendance values"
4. "Close and reopen the popup from the same page"
steps_result:
1. "Lesson Report Detail is displayed"
2. "Collect Attendance popup opens"
3. "Status, reason, notice, and note show the previously saved values"
4. "The same saved values remain prefilled"
steps_data:
1. "Existing Attendance: Leave Early"
2. ""
3. "Reason: Family Reason; Notice: In Advance"
4. "Note: Left early due to family emergency"
